svg.title: Text-to-audio pipeline
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how raw text is transformed into synthesised audio through tokenisation, linguistic analysis, acoustic modelling, vocoding, and post-processing stages.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of text can be fed into a TTS system?')
sendPrompt('What is text normalisation in TTS?')
sendPrompt('How does POS tagging affect speech synthesis?')
sendPrompt('How is prosody predicted in neural TTS?')
sendPrompt('What acoustic model is used in modern TTS like Tacotron?')
sendPrompt('What is a neural vocoder and how does WaveNet work?')
sendPrompt('What audio post-processing is applied to TTS output?')
sendPrompt('What audio formats can TTS output produce?')
